why: Index must no longer reference the deleted entry

output.console: Index rebuild result with updated entry count and duration
output.file: Updated knowledge.json index file without the deleted entry

success_handling.criteria: Index build flow completes and the deleted entry no longer appears in the rebuilt index

event.message: Knowledge index rebuilt after deletion of entry {entry_id}

error_handling.criteria: The knowledge-index-build flow returns an error or does not complete
error_handling.action: Log index build failure as warning, the entry is deleted but may still appear in stale index until next rebuild

event.message: Index rebuild failed after deleting entry {entry_id}

decisions.outcome: Log warning, deletion still considered successful — index will rebuild on next trigger
